notes: Direct BVH->Puppeteer: world-delta transfers world-space rotations, so it is independent of source bone roll/naming — no Mixamo intermediate needed.
Toes (LeftToe/RightToe) omitted — not in the MoMask Keemap bone set.
Root translation is applied as a delta from the BVH rest pose; tune --root-scale / --global-scale if the BVH units differ from the rig.
